title: Logit average 001199 and 001198
summary: Average logits of 001199 and 001198 predictions before applying sigmoid.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Obtain pred_001199 and pred_001198, clip them to [1e-6, 1-1e-6], average their logits with equal weights, and apply sigmoid. Keep all folds and artifacts unchanged.
expected_effect: Blend confidence more naturally than plain probability averaging.
risk: If the models are miscalibrated in different ways, logit averaging can amplify bad confidence.
